mizerShelf marker classes

Source: R/mizerShelf-class.R
mizerShelf-class.Rd

S4 marker subclasses of MizerParams and MizerSim that enable S3 dispatch for shelf-specific methods such as steady(), scaleModel(), removeSpecies(), addSpecies(), and getBiomass().

Details

Objects of class mizerShelf are created by newDetritusCarrionParams(). Objects of class mizerShelfSim are returned automatically by project() when called on a mizerShelf params object.

Developed by Gustav Delius, Silvia de Juan, Francesc Maynou.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
